entry.title: Second Sample Post
entry.summary:
This is a second sample post created as explicitly requested.

It follows the standard Pelican Markdown metadata format required by the repository rules. Since its status is set to draft (as dictated by the setup instructions), it will be excluded from the production build by default but can be previewed …
entry.content:
This is a second sample post created as explicitly requested.

It follows the standard Pelican Markdown metadata format required by the repository rules. Since its status is set to draft (as dictated by the setup instructions), it will be excluded from the production build by default but can be previewed locally using make serve.
